title: Kryeit Gold
description: MoronicMercury's personal modpack for the kryeit server. Adds advanced Performance and Feature Mods.
body:
My personal mod set for the kryeit server, uploaded for useage by other members.
This modpack provides an advanced and performance friendly experience for the kryeit server with mods like tweakaroo and distant horizons.

Important keybinds: 
- PERIOD [ . ] litematica menus and combo key
- [ M ] xaeros worldmap
- [ Z / C ] zoomify
- [ CRTL + Y ] fast block placement 
- [ CTRL + S + L ] light level overlay
- [ R ] swap hotbar
- [ I ] color picker
